departments.label: Engineering
departments.instructions: Maintain drive, hull, power, and navigation. Trade off speed, safety, and maintenance debt carefully.

departments.label: Biosphere
departments.instructions: Protect food, air, water, and fertility stability. Watch diversity, health, and long-term survivability.

departments.label: Civic
departments.instructions: Manage councils, succession, morale, and faction pressure. Preserve order while balancing competing claims.

theme: A generational starship facing succession politics, strategic rerouting, and fragile long-term survival.
